name: alpha vantage api

meta.description: 10+ technical indicators, intraday data, fundamentals, sentiment, top gainers/losers

specs.name: get_adx
specs.description: Get ADX (Average Directional Index). Measures trend strength. Above 25 = strong trend.

specs.name: get_all_technicals
specs.description: Get a complete technical analysis summary: RSI, MACD, SMA 50/200, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX.

specs.name: get_aroon
specs.description: Get Aroon indicator. Measures trend direction and strength.

specs.name: get_atr
specs.description: Get ATR (Average True Range). Measures market volatility.

specs.name: get_balance_sheet
specs.description: Get annual and quarterly balance sheets.

specs.name: get_bollinger_bands
specs.description: Get Bollinger Bands: upper, middle, lower bands.

specs.name: get_cash_flow
specs.description: Get annual and quarterly cash flow statements.

specs.name: get_cci
specs.description: Get CCI (Commodity Channel Index). Above 100 = overbought, below -100 = oversold.

specs.name: get_company_overview
specs.description: Get full company fundamental data from Alpha Vantage.

specs.name: get_crypto_rating
specs.description:
Get crypto fundamental rating and metrics from Alpha Vantage.
symbol: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP, ADA, DOGE

specs.name: get_daily
specs.description: Get daily OHLCV price data (last 100 days).

specs.name: get_earnings
specs.description: Get annual and quarterly EPS earnings history.

specs.name: get_ema
specs.description: Get EMA (Exponential Moving Average). Common periods: 9, 20, 50, 200.

specs.name: get_forex_rate
specs.description: Get real-time forex exchange rate. e.g. from_currency=USD, to_currency=EUR

specs.name: get_income_statement
specs.description: Get annual and quarterly income statements.

specs.name: get_intraday
specs.description:
Get intraday OHLCV price data.
interval: 1min, 5min, 15min, 30min, 60min

specs.name: get_macd
specs.description: Get MACD (Moving Average Convergence Divergence) indicator.

specs.name: get_market_status
specs.description: Get current open/closed status of major global stock exchanges.

specs.name: get_news_sentiment
specs.description:
Get news and sentiment analysis for stocks.
tickers: comma separated e.g. 'AAPL,TSLA'
topics: comma separated e.g. 'technology,earnings,ipo'
Available topics: blockchain, earnings, ipo, mergers_and_acquisitions,
financial_markets, economy_fiscal, economy_monetary, economy_macro,
energy_transportation, finance, life_sciences, manufacturing,
real_estate, retail_wholesale, technology

specs.name: get_obv
specs.description: Get OBV (On Balance Volume). Measures buying/selling pressure using volume.

specs.name: get_rsi
specs.description:
Get RSI (Relative Strength Index). Above 70 = overbought, below 30 = oversold.
interval: 1min, 5min, 15min, 30min, 60min, daily, weekly, monthly

specs.name: get_sma
specs.description: Get SMA (Simple Moving Average). Common periods: 20, 50, 200.

specs.name: get_stochastic
specs.description: Get Stochastic Oscillator (STOCH). Above 80 = overbought, below 20 = oversold.

specs.name: get_top_gainers_losers
specs.description: Get today's top gaining and losing stocks plus most actively traded.

specs.name: get_weekly
specs.description: Get weekly OHLCV price data.

specs.name: search_symbol
specs.description: Search for a stock ticker symbol by company name. e.g. 'Apple', 'Tesla', 'Microsoft'
